subject: Re: Downsample image for CTF estimation?
body:
Hi Andrea,

I'm afraid this isn't planned at the moment. What would be the intended use 
case? Please note that limiting the frequency range used for CTF fitting 
has the same effect.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Thursday, August 16, 2018 at 6:29:52 PM UTC+2, Andrea Nans wrote:
>
> Hi Dmitry,
>
> Just wondering if it will ever be possible to downsample the image for CTF 
> estimation but carry out the motion-correction and particle picking on the 
> un-binned image?
>
> Thanks
>
> Andrea
>
